summary: The PR adds Spark 4.1 connector support with correct import changes for SPARK-52787 (HDFSMetadataLog package reorganization), but the implementation is incomplete. Critical issues include 12 missing source files, duplicate class definitions causing compilation errors, missing test files, and missing version/CI configuration entries. These gaps will prevent the module from compiling and being integrated into the release pipeline.

findings.title: Missing 12 version-specific source files
findings.description: Every version-specific module (3-3, 3-4, 4-0) provides 12 source files that do not exist in the shared base module: CosmosCatalog.scala, SparkInternalsBridge.scala, ChangeFeedMicroBatchStream.scala, CosmosRowConverter.scala, CosmosWriter.scala, ItemsScan.scala, ItemsScanBuilder.scala, ItemsWriterBuilder.scala, RowSerializerPool.scala, CosmosBytesWrittenMetric.scala, CosmosRecordsWrittenMetric.scala, and TotalRequestChargeMetric.scala. Without these files, core functionality is missing and the module will not compile.
findings.suggestion: Copy the 12 files from the 4-0 module (verified to not reference HDFSMetadataLog), or add '${basedir}/../azure-cosmos-spark_4-0_2-13/src/main/scala' as an additional source root in the build-helper-maven-plugin configuration between base and local sources.

findings.title: Duplicate class definitions will cause Scala compilation errors
findings.description: The build-helper-maven-plugin adds both azure-cosmos-spark_3/src/main/scala and the module's own src/main/scala as compilation source roots. Both contain files defining the same fully-qualified classes (com.azure.cosmos.spark.CosmosCatalogBase, com.azure.cosmos.spark.ChangeFeedInitialOffsetWriter). The Scala compiler will fail with duplicate class definitions. This is the only module among 3-3, 3-4, 3-5, and 4-0 that introduces this pattern—all other modules have unique local file names.
findings.suggestion: If chaining through 4-0's sources as suggested in F1, ensure only the 4-1 local overrides (with updated imports) take precedence. Consider creating an intermediate azure-cosmos-spark_4 POM (like azure-cosmos-spark_3-5 for 3.5 variants) to share the 12 Spark 4.x files between 4-0 and 4-1.

findings.title: Missing 6 version-specific test files
findings.description: The 4-0 module includes 6 test files (CosmosCatalogITest.scala, SparkE2EQueryITest.scala, ItemsScanITest.scala, CosmosRowConverterTest.scala, ChangeFeedMetricsListenerITest.scala, RowSerializerPollTest.scala) that are not present in the 4-1 module. The 4-1 module only includes CosmosCatalogITestBase.scala, which is itself a duplicate-class conflict with the base module.
findings.suggestion: Copy the 6 test files from the 4-0 module if applicable for Spark 4.1, or ensure they are sourced from 4-0 via the build-helper configuration.

findings.title: Missing version_client.txt entry
findings.description: The pom.xml line 14 contains the marker {x-version-update;com.azure.cosmos.spark:azure-cosmos-spark_4-1_2-13;current} which references a version key that does not exist in version_client.txt. This will cause Azure SDK version validation to fail.
findings.suggestion: Add the following entry to eng/versioning/version_client.txt after line 120: com.azure.cosmos.spark:azure-cosmos-spark_4-1_2-13;4.46.0;4.47.0

findings.title: Missing external_dependencies.txt entry
findings.description: The pom.xml line 194 contains the marker {x-version-update;cosmos-spark_4-1_org.apache.spark:spark-sql_2.13;external_dependency} which has no matching entry. Only cosmos-spark_4-0_org.apache.spark:spark-sql_2.13;4.0.0 exists at line 238.
findings.suggestion: Add the following entry to eng/versioning/external_dependencies.txt after line 238: cosmos-spark_4-1_org.apache.spark:spark-sql_2.13;4.1.0

findings.title: Missing CI pipeline configuration
findings.description: The 4-0 module appears in 6 places in ci.yml (trigger paths, excludes, release parameter, artifact definition). The 4-1 module appears in none of them. Without CI integration, this module will not be built, tested, or released.
findings.suggestion: Mirror all 4-0 CI entries for 4-1, including: trigger/PR paths (sdk/cosmos/azure-cosmos-spark_4-1_2-13/), pom.xml exclusion, release parameter (release_azurecosmosspark41_scala213 with displayName 'azure-cosmos-spark_4-1_2-13'), and artifact entry with uberJar: true.

findings.title: CONTRIBUTING.md references wrong module directory
findings.description: Line 13 contains 'cd sdk/cosmos/azure-cosmos-spark_4-0_2-13', which appears to be a copy-paste error from the 4-0 module documentation.
findings.suggestion: Change the directory reference to 'cd sdk/cosmos/azure-cosmos-spark_4-1_2-13'.

findings.title: README.md claims untested Spark 4.1.1 support
findings.description: Line 23 lists both 4.1.0 and 4.1.1 as supported Spark versions, but the Maven dependency targets only spark-sql_2.13:4.1.0. The 4-0 README lists only 4.0.0 as supported. Claiming support for 4.1.1 without testing or explicit Spark 4.1.1 in dependencies is inconsistent.
findings.suggestion: Either verify Spark 4.1.1 compatibility and update the Spark dependency to include 4.1.1, or remove 4.1.1 from the supported versions list to match the tested 4.1.0 dependency.

findings.title: Missing trailing newlines in 3 files
findings.description: Files do not end with a newline character, producing '\ No newline at end of file' markers in diffs. All corresponding files in existing modules (4-0, 3-5, etc.) end with a newline for consistency.
findings.suggestion: Add a trailing newline to the end of pom.xml, README.md, and CHANGELOG.md.

findings.title: Correct import adaptation for SPARK-52787
findings.description: The overridden files (ChangeFeedInitialOffsetWriter.scala, CosmosCatalogBase.scala, and CosmosCatalogITestBase.scala) correctly update the import from org.apache.spark.sql.execution.streaming.HDFSMetadataLog to org.apache.spark.sql.execution.streaming.checkpointing.HDFSMetadataLog to handle the package reorganization introduced in Spark 4.1. The inlined validateVersion logic is consistent with the base module's approach.

findings.title: Unrelated .gitignore change
findings.description: The PR adds '.coding-harness/' to .gitignore, which is tooling infrastructure unrelated to Spark 4.1 support implementation.
findings.suggestion: Consider separating .gitignore changes into their own commit to keep the Spark 4.1 feature commit focused.
